name: dask
tagline: Reference skill teaching when/how to use Dask for out-of-core and distributed pandas/NumPy workflows.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped documentation skill. No secret access, no network exfiltration, no hidden or manipulative instructions, and package installs are limited to mainstream PyPI packages (dask, s3fs, gcsfs). Description gives clear positive and negative triggers, and detail is offloaded to reference files to keep context lean. Safe to install.
